questionText: Complete a frase com a preposição correta: 'The software update resulted ___ a significant improvement in processing speed.'
Qual é a forma verbal correta para completar a frase? 'The developers ___ the new feature for over six months before it was finally released.'
Escolha o artigo adequado: 'She uploaded ___ algorithm that changed the way data is processed across the platform.'
Qual preposição completa corretamente a frase? 'This application is compatible ___ both iOS and Android operating systems.'
Selecione o tempo verbal correto: 'By the time the patch was released, the hackers ___ already stolen thousands of records.'
Complete a frase com a opção gramaticalmente correta: 'The IT team is responsible ___ maintaining the company's network infrastructure.'
Qual é a conjugação correta do verbo na voz passiva? 'The database ___ routinely backed up every night to prevent data loss.'
Complete a frase com o pronome relativo adequado: 'The programmer ___ wrote the original code has since moved to a different company.'
Escolha a forma correta do modal: 'You ___ restart the router before calling technical support; it usually solves the problem.'
Qual é a preposição correta para a frase? 'The engineer logged ___ the server remotely to diagnose the issue.'
Selecione a forma verbal correta: 'The app ___ millions of users since it was launched on the market.'
Complete a frase com a opção correta: 'The new operating system is far ___ efficient than its predecessor.'
Qual preposição é correta neste contexto? 'The company specializes ___ developing cybersecurity solutions for financial institutions.'
Escolha a forma correta do gerúndio ou infinitivo: 'The team decided ___ the legacy system before migrating to the cloud.'
Qual é o artigo correto para completar a frase? 'After months of testing, the startup finally released ___ update that fixed the critical vulnerability.'
Complete a frase com o tempo verbal correto: 'Unless the firewall ___ properly configured, the system will remain vulnerable to attacks.'
Selecione a preposição adequada: 'The file was corrupted due ___ an unexpected power outage during the upload.'
Qual estrutura condicional é gramaticalmente correta neste contexto? 'If the server ___ overloaded, we would have experienced significant downtime during the product launch.'
Escolha a forma correta do particípio para completar a frase nominal: 'The data ___ by the algorithm proved to be far more reliable than manually collected samples.'
Complete a frase com a conjunção mais adequada ao registro formal: 'The prototype was shelved, ___ the team had invested considerable resources in its development.'
Qual é a forma verbal correta na voz passiva com modal? 'All user passwords ___ encrypted before being stored in the database.'
Identifique a estrutura de inversão gramaticalmente correta: '___ the security breach been detected earlier, significant data loss could have been prevented.'
Qual é o uso correto do pronome relativo em contexto formal? 'The engineer to ___ we outsourced the network redesign has since won several industry awards.'
Escolha a forma correta do gerúndio composto: '___ all possible edge cases before deployment significantly reduced the number of post-launch bugs.'
Qual preposição completa corretamente a expressão formal? 'The API documentation is in keeping ___ industry standards for interoperability.'
Complete a frase com o modal perfeito correto: 'The developers ___ anticipated the compatibility issues with legacy systems before releasing the update.'
Identifique a estrutura de cláusula reduzida correta: 'The platform, ___ to over 50 million devices, struggles to manage peak-hour traffic.'
Qual é a estrutura correta com 'wish' para expressar arrependimento no passado? 'The CTO wishes the company ___ in quantum encryption research five years ago.'
Selecione a forma correta do verbo principal em uma estrutura causativa: 'The CTO had the entire network infrastructure ___ before the system migration.'
Qual é a estrutura condicional mista correta? 'If they ___ a more robust codebase from the beginning, the system would be far more stable today.'
Escolha a preposição correta para um verbo composto formal: 'The quarterly report touched ___ the need for greater investment in edge computing infrastructure.'
Qual é o uso correto do subjuntivo em inglês formal? 'The board recommended that the security audit ___ conducted by an independent third party.'
Identifique a estrutura de ênfase (cleft sentence) correta: '___ the lack of proper version control that ultimately led to the catastrophic system failure.'
Complete a frase com a forma correta do particípio absoluto: '___ the critical patch applied, the development team turned their attention to optimizing performance.'
Qual é a estrutura nominal correta para este contexto técnico? 'The committee expressed concern about the ___ of proprietary data to third-party cloud providers.'
Selecione o advérbio de modo mais adequado ao nível de formalidade: 'The algorithm processes incoming requests ___, ensuring minimal latency even under heavy load.'
Identifique a construção gramatical correta com 'no sooner': 'No sooner ___ the software deployed than a critical zero-day vulnerability was discovered.'
Qual é a estrutura correta de inversão com 'not only'? 'Not only ___ the malware exfiltrate sensitive data, but it also rendered critical systems inoperable.'
Escolha a estrutura nominal gerundiva correta em inglês formal: 'The protocol mandates ___ all transmitted data with end-to-end encryption prior to storage.'

Qual construção de particípio absoluto está gramaticalmente correta neste contexto técnico? '___ several legacy modules still embedded in the codebase, the migration proved far more complex than anticipated.'
Identifique a forma passiva com modal perfeito progressivo correta: 'The data pipeline ___ monitored continuously for the past 72 hours when the anomaly was detected.'
Qual estrutura com 'lest' está gramaticalmente correta neste contexto formal? 'All API endpoints must be thoroughly documented lest future developers ___ how to interact with the system.'

Selecione a forma verbal correta na construção de 'would rather' para expressar preferência sobre a ação de outra pessoa: 'The lead architect would rather the junior developers ___ any changes to the core modules without prior review.'
Qual é a construção correta de 'as...as' com gerúndio em contexto técnico formal? 'Deploying microservices is nowhere near as straightforward ___ managing a monolithic architecture.'

Identifique a estrutura de cláusula reduzida com inversão mais adequada para registro altamente formal: '___ the development team to fail to deliver the patch within 48 hours, the entire production environment could face irreversible damage.'
Qual é a construção nominal pós-verbal correta com 'to the point of'? 'The new rendering engine optimized GPU usage ___ the point of near eliminating idle processing cycles.'
Selecione a forma correta do particípio passado em construção absoluta elíptica: 'The firmware update, once ___, requires a mandatory system reboot to take full effect.'
Qual é a forma correta do verbo 'need' em sua função semi-modal em voz passiva formal? 'The entire authentication module ___ overhauled before the product can be considered production-ready.'
Identifique a construção de 'such...that' gramaticalmente correta: 'The latency introduced by the legacy protocol was ___ that real-time communication became virtually impossible.'

Qual é a estrutura de clivagem (pseudo-cleft) gramaticalmente correta neste contexto técnico? '___ the engineering team underestimated was the sheer complexity of integrating the two disparate systems.'
Selecione a forma verbal correta na construção 'the + comparative, the + comparative': 'The ___ processing power a system has, the more complex the machine learning models it can run.'
